'''Mandal Hypernautics Corporation''' was a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] and [[Tank/Legends|tank]] manufacturing organization founded on [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]].

==History==
Mandal Hypernautics produced vehicles like the [[StarViper-class attack platform/Legends|''StarViper''-class attack platform]] and the [[Crusader-class corvette|''Crusader''-class corvette]].<ref name="EAW" />

At [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], [[Tyber Zann]] conducted pirate raids on Mandalore and the corporation to "convince" Mandal Hypernautics to help him in his conquest to establish his underworld empire by supplying him with ships and the latest models of war machines. Soon Mandal Hypernautics supplied Crusader-class corvettes to Zann's organization in order to buy a cease-fire.<ref name="EAW" />

Later on, despite Zann ordering his pirates to stop raiding the company, they raided Mandal's outlying shipyards and had the company turn over the [[Keldabe-class cruiser|''Keldabe''-class battleship]] and the [[Canderous-class assault tank|''Canderous''-class assault tank]] to the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] in order to stop the raids. Despite his success, Zann killed the [[Unidentified Zann Consortium captain|pirate captain]] for his disobedience.<ref name="EAW" />

Zann's Consortium became a heavy consumer of the company's ships and they made up a significant part of its military forces.<ref name="EAW" />
